description_long: This bench features a robust, cylindrical padded seat upholstered in worn brown leather, supported by four angled wooden legs with metal-capped feet. Two sturdy metal handles are mounted on the top, suggesting a design inspired by gymnastic pommel horses. The leather surface shows signs of age and use, with visible creases and patina, adding a vintage character. The legs are slightly splayed for stability, and their wood grain is visible, contrasting with the darker seat. The overall construction appears solid and utilitarian, with no backrest or armrests. This bench would be well-suited for urban parks, playgrounds, or retro-themed public spaces.
description: A vintage-style bench with a cylindrical brown leather seat, four splayed wooden legs, and two metal handles on top, resembling a gymnastic pommel horse.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cylindrical leather seat, both metal handles, and all four angled wooden legs.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the rounded end of the seat, the two metal handles, and the splayed arrangement of the legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the seat's length, handles, and the legs' outward angles.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, focusing on the rounded seat end, handles, and the spread of the legs.
attribute_leg_design: four angled wooden legs with metal-capped feet
